_note: openclaw v2026.5+ has no 'cron import' command. Register jobs individually — see README-setup.md step 6 for the equivalent openclaw cron add commands.
_register_commands: openclaw cron add --cron '0 9 * * *' --description 'Daily in-scope wildcard recon' --message 'Run daily recon pipeline: bash ./recon-pipeline.sh' --timeout-seconds 7200

openclaw cron add --cron '30 1 * * *' --description 'Nightly BugBountyHunter triage and report' --message 'Run BugBountyHunter triage and reporting on manifest: $(cat /bb/incoming/latest/manifest.json)' --model 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6' --timeout-seconds 5400

jobs.description: Daily in-scope wildcard recon and triage ingestion
Nightly triage and report generation for latest recon bundle
jobs._note: type 'openclaw_skill' is not a native cron task type. This job must be added via: openclaw cron add --cron '30 1 * * *' --message 'Run BugBountyHunter ...' --model 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6' --timeout-seconds 5400

task.message: Run BugBountyHunter with tags traffic_triage and reporting on manifest: $(cat /bb/incoming/latest/manifest.json)
